questions.hindi: प्रिय मित्र, मुझे आशा है तुम ठीक होगे।
options: Please replace it as soon as possible.
I want to tell you about my new job.
Dear friend, I hope you are well.
questions.answer: Dear friend, I hope you are well.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "प्रिय मित्र, मुझे आशा है तुम ठीक होगे।" = "Dear friend, I hope you are well."

questions.sentence: I want to tell _____ about my new job.
questions.answer: you
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I want to tell you about my new job."

questions.sentence: Respected Sir, I am writing this letter to you as a complaint yesterday.
options: Respected Sir, I am writing this letter to you as a complaint yesterday.
Respected Sir, I am writing this letter to you as a complaint.
questions.answer: Respected Sir, I am writing this letter to you as a complaint.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Respected Sir, I am writing this letter to you as a complaint."

questions.hindi: सड़क की हालत बहुत खराब है।
options: Dear sister, congratulations on your wedding.
I will come to meet you soon.
The condition of the road is very bad.
questions.answer: The condition of the road is very bad.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "सड़क की हालत बहुत खराब है।" = "The condition of the road is very bad."

questions.answer: this
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "Please solve this problem."

questions.sentence: Dear mother, I am fine here yesterday.
options: Dear mother, I am fine here yesterday.
Dear mother, I am fine here.
questions.answer: Dear mother, I am fine here.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Dear mother, I am fine here."

questions.hindi: मुझे तुम्हारी बहुत याद आती है।
options: Dear friend, I hope you are well.
questions.answer: I miss you a lot.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मुझे तुम्हारी बहुत याद आती है।" = "I miss you a lot."

questions.answer: loving
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "Your loving son."

questions.sentence: Respected Editor, I request you to publish this letter yesterday.
options: Respected Editor, I request you to publish this letter yesterday.
Respected Editor, I request you to publish this letter.
questions.answer: Respected Editor, I request you to publish this letter.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Respected Editor, I request you to publish this letter."

questions.hindi: यह समस्या पूरे शहर को प्रभावित कर रही है।
options: Dear friend, I received your letter.
The condition of the road is very bad.
Dear sister, congratulations on your wedding.
This problem is affecting the whole city.
questions.answer: This problem is affecting the whole city.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "यह समस्या पूरे शहर को प्रभावित कर रही है।" = "This problem is affecting the whole city."

questions.answer: on
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "Dear sister, congratulations on your wedding."

questions.sentence: I will definitely come to the wedding yesterday.
options: I will definitely come to the wedding yesterday.
I will definitely come to the wedding.
questions.answer: I will definitely come to the wedding.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I will definitely come to the wedding."

questions.hindi: आदरणीय प्रबंधक महोदय, मैं अपने ऑर्डर के बारे में लिख रहा हूँ।
options: Respected Manager, I am writing about my order.
questions.answer: Respected Manager, I am writing about my order.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "आदरणीय प्रबंधक महोदय, मैं अपने ऑर्डर के बारे में लिख रहा हूँ।" = "Respected Manager, I am writing about my order."

questions.answer: the
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I received the wrong product."

questions.sentence: Please replace it as soon as possible yesterday.
options: Please replace it as soon as possible yesterday.
Please replace it as soon as possible.
questions.answer: Please replace it as soon as possible.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Please replace it as soon as possible."

options: Respected Sir, I am writing this letter to you as a complaint.
This problem is affecting the whole city.
Dear friend, I received your letter.
questions.answer: Yours faithfully, Rahul Sharma.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "भवदीय, राहुल शर्मा।" = "Yours faithfully, Rahul Sharma."

questions.answer: received
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "Dear friend, I received your letter."

questions.sentence: I will come to meet you soon yesterday.
options: I will come to meet you soon yesterday.
I will come to meet you soon.
questions.answer: I will come to meet you soon.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I will come to meet you soon."

options: Dear mother, I am fine here.
Respected Manager, I am writing about my order.
questions.answer: This letter is formal.
